apis.purpose: Value max size constant (16MB)

apis.purpose: Get Preferences instance by name using callback

apis.purpose: Get Preferences instance by name using Promise

apis.purpose: Get Preferences instance with Options using callback

apis.purpose: Get Preferences instance with Options using Promise

apis.purpose: Get Preferences instance synchronously

apis.purpose: Delete Preferences instance and its persistent file by name (callback)

apis.purpose: Delete Preferences instance and its persistent file by name (Promise)

apis.purpose: Delete Preferences instance with Options (callback)

apis.purpose: Delete Preferences instance with Options (Promise)

apis.purpose: Remove Preferences instance from cache by name (callback)

apis.purpose: Remove Preferences instance from cache by name (Promise)

apis.purpose: Remove Preferences instance from cache synchronously

apis.name: preferences.StorageType
apis.purpose: Enum for storage mode: XML (0) or GSKV (1)

apis.name: preferences.isStorageTypeSupported
apis.purpose: Check if a storage mode is supported on current platform

apis.purpose: Configuration interface: name, dataGroupId, storageType

apis.purpose: Read a value by key from cache with default (callback)

apis.name: Preferences.get (Promise)
apis.purpose: Read a value by key from cache with default (Promise)

apis.name: Preferences.getSync
apis.purpose: Read a value by key synchronously

apis.name: Preferences.getAll (callback)
apis.purpose: Get all key-value pairs from cache (callback)

apis.name: Preferences.getAll (Promise)
apis.purpose: Get all key-value pairs from cache (Promise)

apis.name: Preferences.getAllSync
apis.purpose: Get all key-value pairs synchronously

apis.purpose: Write a key-value pair to cached instance (callback)

apis.name: Preferences.put (Promise)
apis.purpose: Write a key-value pair to cached instance (Promise)

apis.name: Preferences.putSync
apis.purpose: Write a key-value pair synchronously

apis.name: Preferences.has (callback)
apis.purpose: Check if a key exists (callback)

apis.name: Preferences.has (Promise)
apis.purpose: Check if a key exists (Promise)

apis.name: Preferences.hasSync
apis.purpose: Check if a key exists synchronously

apis.name: Preferences.delete (callback)
apis.purpose: Delete a key-value pair from cache (callback)

apis.purpose: Delete a key-value pair from cache (Promise)

apis.name: Preferences.deleteSync
apis.purpose: Delete a key-value pair synchronously

apis.name: Preferences.flush (callback)
apis.purpose: Persist cached data to disk (callback, XML mode only)

apis.name: Preferences.flush (Promise)
apis.purpose: Persist cached data to disk (Promise, XML mode only)

apis.name: Preferences.flushSync
apis.purpose: Persist cached data to disk synchronously

apis.name: Preferences.clear (callback)
apis.purpose: Clear all data from cached instance (callback)

apis.name: Preferences.clear (Promise)
apis.purpose: Clear all data from cached instance (Promise)

apis.name: Preferences.clearSync
apis.purpose: Clear all data synchronously

apis.name: Preferences.on('change')
apis.purpose: Subscribe to all key change events

apis.name: Preferences.on('multiProcessChange')
apis.purpose: Subscribe to inter-process change events

apis.name: Preferences.on('dataChange')
apis.purpose: Subscribe to specific key change events with new value

apis.name: Preferences.off('change')
apis.purpose: Unsubscribe from change events

apis.name: Preferences.off('multiProcessChange')
apis.purpose: Unsubscribe from multi-process change events

apis.name: Preferences.off('dataChange')
apis.purpose: Unsubscribe from specific key change events

apis.name: ValueType
apis.purpose: Supported value types union type

notableFindings: Preferences is single-process only; concurrent multi-process access risks file corruption.
Default XML mode requires explicit `flush()` to persist; GSKV mode (API 18+) auto-persists on write.
API 10+ introduced Options-based overloads and sync variants (getSync, putSync, etc.).
API 12+ added exact key subscription on('dataChange') with value callback and bigint/object ValueType support.
missingApis: dataPreferences — This is not a standalone HarmonyOS API. It was used as a variable name in early examples for `preferences.getPreferences()` results. No separate module or API named `dataPreferences` exists in the HarmonyOS references.
